# Collapsible

Styled collapsible component family built on zw-collapsible primitives.

<div class="zw-badge-row">
  <span class="zw-badge">@zeus-web/collapsible</span>
  <span class="zw-badge">primitive-only</span>
  <span class="zw-badge">Generated</span>
</div>

## Install

This component does not have a registry template yet.

Install the primitive package instead:

```bash
pnpm add @zeus-web/collapsible
```

## Imports

Styled registry component:

Not available yet.

Primitive React wrapper:

```tsx
import {
  Collapsible,
  CollapsibleContent,
  CollapsibleTrigger,
} from '@zeus-web/collapsible/react'
```

Web Component entry:

```ts
import '@zeus-web/collapsible/wc'
```

## Props

| Prop          | Type      | Default | Description                   |
| ------------- | --------- | ------- | ----------------------------- |
| `open`        | `boolean` | -       | Controlled open state.        |
| `defaultOpen` | `boolean` | -       | Initial open state.           |
| `disabled`    | `boolean` | -       | Disables trigger interaction. |

## Events

| Event         | React prop     | Detail                              | Description                      |
| ------------- | -------------- | ----------------------------------- | -------------------------------- |
| `open-change` | `onOpenChange` | `open: boolean, nativeEvent: Event` | Emitted when open state changes. |

## Slots

| Slot      | Description                   |
| --------- | ----------------------------- |
| `default` | Trigger and content children. |

## Styling

Uses Tailwind: yes

Theme tokens:

- `ring-ring`

Internal selectors:

- `[data-slot=collapsible-trigger-button]`
- `[data-slot=collapsible-content]`

## Registry

Registry source: not available yet.

The `collapsible` primitive is available through `@zeus-web/collapsible`, but it is not currently installable through `zweb add collapsible`.

Use the primitive package directly until a registry template is added.

## AI usage rules

Do:

- Use Collapsible for simple show/hide content.
- Use CollapsibleTrigger and CollapsibleContent together.

Do not:

- Do not use Collapsible when multiple related sections should coordinate; use Accordion instead.

## Examples

### React styled usage

```tsx
import { Collapsible, CollapsibleContent, CollapsibleTrigger } from '@/components/ui/collapsible'\n\nexport function Example() {\n  return (\n    <Collapsible>\n      <CollapsibleTrigger>Toggle</CollapsibleTrigger>\n      <CollapsibleContent>Content</CollapsibleContent>\n    </Collapsible>\n  )\n}
```
